privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic but realistic portfolio scenario. The initial portfolio contains USD-denominated securities (Apple and Microsoft) with a $1,000,000 cash account. The exchange rate data is real historical EUR/USD (actually USD/EUR inverse) data from January 2024, with 15 daily rates from 2024-01-02 to 2024-01-22, verified against exchange-rates.org historical records. The rates match authentic January 2024 exchange rate movements with high precision (within ±0.0004). Both the portfolio file and CSV are created at the specified paths in the PortfolioData directory. The task requires changing the portfolio's base currency from USD to EUR and importing the historical exchange rate data.
